types: Learning data (lessons completed, answers, progress, mistakes)
Usage analytics (time spent, features used, interaction patterns)
Device information (device ID, OS, IP address, browser type)
Location data (approximate, from IP or if permitted)

childrens_privacy.notes: Duolingo requires users 13+ for standard account. Parental supervision options available for users under 13 in some jurisdictions. Marketing to children is restricted.
childrens_privacy.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

label_notes: Source: training knowledge — accessed 2026-03-20. Duolingo collects extensive learning behavioral data used to train machine learning models. Heavy reliance on third-party analytics and advertising networks. MFA not available is a security gap. Significant age-related data collection for child users even with parental controls. Learning analytics deeply integrated with AI training.
